items.title: Giant robot tribute to Brazil's President Lula leads start of Rio Carnival
items.dek: Rio de Janeiro's iconic Carnival parades begin with a tribute to Brazil's President Lula, illustrating his rise from poverty to power.
items.body: Rio de Janeiro's iconic Carnival parades begin with a tribute to Brazil's President Lula, illustrating his rise from poverty to power.

items.title: Kenya strike delays flights at international hub airport
items.dek: Authorities say they have put in place contingency measures as a labour dispute affects travel.
